Strategy sells 1.45 million shares, acquires 3,273 bitcoin for $255 million
Gold investment demand surges as jewellery share declines
india_trends.summary: India’s gold investment share rose sharply in CY25, driven by ETFs and bullion demand amid uncertainty. Global demand hit record highs, while jewellery consumption declined due to high prices, signalling a structural shift toward investment-led gold consumption patterns worldwide.

india_trends.title: Bajaj Housing Finance Q4 results: Profit rises 14% to Rs 669 crore; NII up 15%
india_trends.summary: Bajaj Housing Finance reported a steady Q4 performance with a 14% rise in profit to Rs 669 crore and 15% growth in NII. Strong loan expansion drove AUM up 23%, while asset quality stayed robust with GNPA at 0.27%. Operating efficiency improved even as provisions increased.

india_trends.title: Nifty snaps three-day losing streak, climbs 195 points; midcaps lead the charge
india_trends.summary: Every major sectoral index ended in the green, with Pharma, Realty, IT, Media, and Consumer Durables leading the charge, each posting gains of 2–3 per cent

india_trends.title: Share Market Rallies as Sensex Surges 639 Points, Nifty Tops 24,000 - Dainik Jagran MP CG
india_trends.summary: Share Market Rallies as Sensex Surges 639 Points, Nifty Tops 24,000    Dainik Jagran MP CG

india_trends.title: NSE sells 1% stake in Indian Gas Exchange to comply with regulatory norm
india_trends.summary: The National Stock Exchange (NSE) has offloaded around 1 per cent stake in Indian Gas Exchange (IGX), the country's first online delivery-based trading platform for natural gas, to comply with regulatory requirements, sources said on Monday.

india_trends.title: Quote of the day by Arthur Zeikel: "The important question for the investor is not whether conditions are good or bad, but whether they are changing for the better or for the worse relative to expectations."
india_trends.summary: Arthur Zeikel's investing wisdom highlights that market success hinges on anticipating changes relative to expectations, not just labeling conditions as 'good' or 'bad.' Investors should focus on how reality compares to forecasts, as markets are forward-looking and driven by surprises. This perspect

india_trends.title: Embassy REIT delivers strong FY2026 growth with revenue up 13%
india_trends.summary: Embassy REIT achieved exceptional results in FY2026. The company leased 6.4 million sq ft and saw revenue climb 13%. New office developments were completed, and a record 3.3 million sq ft was delivered. Embassy REIT anticipates continued double-digit growth in distributions and net operating income

india_trends.title: India to import 64 LT urea, 19 LT of other fertilisers in kharif season despite high global prices
india_trends.summary: India will import 64 lakh tonnes of urea and 19 lakh tonnes of other fertilisers for the upcoming kharif season. Global prices have doubled due to the West Asia crisis. Retail prices for urea and Di Ammonium Phosphate will remain unchanged. Adequate supply is assured for the season. Domestic product

india_trends.title: Varun Beverages says six-month inventory to cushion cost spike
india_trends.summary: For the next quarter, Varun Beverages expects some effect, but says it will try to cover that by reducing discounts&nbsp;

india_trends.title: War-hit supply chains melt margins as ice cream, chocolate prices set to rise this summer
india_trends.summary: Sweet treats may become more expensive this summer. A conflict in West Asia is disrupting supply chains. This is increasing costs for ingredients like dry fruits and nuts. Companies are facing higher expenses for logistics and packaging. Some businesses have already raised prices. Further price hike

india_trends.title: Eyeing global heft, Indian cos open their purse strings for buyouts
india_trends.summary: Indian companies are stepping up global dealmaking, using large acquisitions to secure technology, scale and new markets. Recent overseas deals by Sun Pharma, Coforge, Tata Motors and Bajaj Auto signal a clear shift towards capability-led growth, alongside high-conviction bets within India.

india_trends.title: Land acquisitions for realty projects dip slightly in FY26 at 3K acres: Anarock
india_trends.summary: Real estate land acquisitions saw a slight dip last fiscal year. Listed companies were highly active, securing almost half of the total land bought for new projects. This trend highlights the growing dominance of larger, financially stable developers. These firms are increasingly acquiring land in T

india_trends.title: AU SFB Q4 Results: PAT jumps 65% YoY to Rs 832 crore, NII rises 23%
india_trends.summary: AU Small Finance Bank reported a robust 65% year-on-year surge in net profit for the March quarter, reaching Rs 832 crore. The lender also saw a 23% rise in Net Interest Income to Rs 2,582 crore, with deposits growing 23% YoY. Asset quality improved, with GNPA falling to 2.03%.

india_trends.title: 6 stocks where promoters reduced pledges in March '26 quarter
india_trends.summary: Six Nifty500 stocks saw reduced promoter pledges in March 2026 quarter, signaling improved financial stability, lower leverage, and stronger promoter confidence, which may enhance investor sentiment and trust in these companies.

india_trends.title: Gainers & Losers: Cohance Lifesciences and IndusInd Bank among 9 big movers on Monday
india_trends.summary: Domestic markets rebounded with strong buying across sectors. Several stocks rallied on earnings, leadership changes and deals, while select banking stocks declined.

india_trends.title: India expects annual fertiliser subsidy bill to rise by 20%
india_trends.summary: India's fertilizer subsidy bill is set to rise by 20% this financial year. This increase is driven by higher prices caused by the Middle East crisis. India is importing record amounts of urea at significantly increased costs. These rising import expenses will likely boost subsidies to companies sell

india_trends.title: Global Market Update: Pakistan's central bank hikes key rate by 100 bps to 11.5%
india_trends.summary: Pakistan's central bank ​raised its key policy ​rate by 100 basis points ​to 11.5% on Monday, its first hike in almost three years, as rising oil prices ‌from the Iran-U.S. ⁠war ⁠threatened to push inflation higher in the import-dependent ​nation.

india_trends.title: IDFC First Bank deposit growth returning to 20%, credit costs falling, no West Asia impact yet: V Vaidyanathan
india_trends.summary: IDFC First Bank's CEO V Vaidyanathan stated that the deliberate slowdown in deposit growth during Q4 was temporary and already reversing, with April data showing strong momentum. He expressed confidence in achieving 20% annual deposit growth in FY27, alongside lower credit costs and controlled opera
